results.title: Rapid Relief Team Supports Law Enforcement During National Police Week
results.description: Volunteers from across North America provided thousands of meals and refreshments in honor of fallen officers and their families JOPPA, Md. , June 3, 2026 /CNW/ -- The Rapid Relief Team (RRT), the charitable arm of the Plymouth Brethren Christian Church, concluded a week of service during National Police Week in Washington, D.C., supporting law enforcement officers, families of fallen officers, and attendees gathered to honor lives lost in the line of duty.
